mapper.select: SELECT id, `쉼표번호`, year_month, total_rest_minutes, type_ratio_json, avg_emotion_score, record_count FROM monthly_stats WHERE `쉼표번호` = #{쉼표번호} AND year_month = #{yearMonth}

SELECT id, `쉼표번호`, year_month, total_rest_minutes, type_ratio_json, avg_emotion_score, record_count FROM monthly_stats WHERE `쉼표번호` = #{쉼표번호} AND year_month BETWEEN #{startMonth} AND #{endMonth} ORDER BY year_month
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, start_time, end_time)), 0) FROM rest_logs WHERE `쉼표번호` = #{쉼표번호} AND deleted = 0 AND DATE_FORMAT(start_time, '%Y-%m') = #{yearMonth}
SELECT AVG(emotion_after) FROM rest_logs WHERE `쉼표번호` = #{쉼표번호} AND deleted = 0 AND DATE_FORMAT(start_time, '%Y-%m') = #{yearMonth} AND emotion_after IS NOT NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rest_logs WHERE `쉼표번호` = #{쉼표번호} AND deleted = 0 AND DATE_FORMAT(start_time, '%Y-%m') = #{yearMonth}
SELECT id, `쉼표번호`, year_month, total_rest_minutes, type_ratio_json, avg_emotion_score, record_count FROM monthly_stats WHERE `쉼표번호` = #{쉼표번호} AND year_month = #{yearMonth}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO monthly_stats (`쉼표번호`, year_month, total_rest_minutes, type_ratio_json, avg_emotion_score, record_count) VALUES (#{쉼표번호}, #{yearMonth}, #{totalRestMinutes}, #{typeRatioJson}, #{avgEmotionScore}, #{recordCount})
